category_title: Disengaged Aboriginal students in an alternative education setting
scenario_title: Traditional transmission pedagogy and independent work
minimal_context: The student is asked to independently read a novel chapter and complete comprehension and grammar worksheets in the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please read the next chapter of the novel independently and then answer the literal-level comprehension questions on your worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm tired. I don't care about this novel.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to finish the reading and the grammar worksheets.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Wanders over to one of the four classroom computers) I'm going to watch video clips on YouTube instead.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please sit back down and do your work on your own.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm not doing it. If you keep trying to make me do this, I'm walking out of the classroom.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please read the next chapter of the novel independently and then answer the literal-level comprehension questions on your worksheet.

STUDENT: I'm tired. I don't care about this novel.

TUTOR: You need to finish the reading and the grammar worksheets.

STUDENT: (Wanders over to one of the four classroom computers) I'm going to watch video clips on YouTube instead.

TUTOR: Please sit back down and do your work on your own.

STUDENT: I'm not doing it. If you keep trying to make me do this, I'm walking out of the classroom.
